Settings.name: externalprocessor.metadata_exporter_min_confidence
Settings.caption: Min Confidence
Settings.description: Only send objects with confidence >= this value.

Settings.name: externalprocessor.metadata_exporter_heartbeat_seconds
Settings.caption: Heartbeat (seconds)
Settings.description: Send a periodic status event every N seconds; 0 = off.

Settings.name: externalprocessor.metadata_exporter_send_track
Settings.caption: Stream tracking
Settings.description: Send per-frame object positions (heatmap / trajectories / live counts).

Settings.name: externalprocessor.metadata_exporter_track_fps
Settings.caption: Tracking rate (fps)
Settings.description: Max tracking samples per second per camera; 0 = off.

Settings.name: externalprocessor.metadata_exporter_scene_seconds
Settings.caption: Scene refresh (seconds)
Settings.description: Send a downscaled full-frame backdrop every N seconds; 0 = off.
